{{Quote|Before the Battle of Naboo, we wore blast armor as an indulgence. Now we consider it a necessity.|Captain Panaka|<ref name="NEG" />}}
'''Blast armor''', or '''blast-dampening armor''', was a type of [[armor]] produced by [[Creshaldyne Industries/Legends|Creshaldyne Industries]].<ref name="NEG" />

Thick enough to carry significant blast-dampening properties, yet light enough to allow movement in combat, the [[Creshaldyne Industries/Legends|Creshaldyne Industries]] blast armor was a medium [[armor]] jerkin that protected against sonic energy, electrical energy, thermal energy, and significant cold.<ref name="NEG" /> Protecting the chest, back, and shoulders, the exterior of the armor was made from a rubbery material filled with thousands of tiny reflective crystals in a semisolid gel.<ref name="NEG" /> These crystals both diffused [[blaster]] energy, and absorbed the intense heat generated by blaster bolts.<ref name="NEG" /> The gel, meanwhile, absorbed significant kinetic impact, protecting the wearer by dispersing impacts caused by punches, kicks, falls, and bludgeoning weapons.<ref name="NEG" /> The combination of rubber exterior and gel interior drastically slowed vibrations from [[vibroblade]]s, seriously diminishing the effects of such weapons - and effectively protecting the wearer against piercing and slashing attacks.<ref name="NEG" />

This type of armor was utilized by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Naboo Security Guard]], who were assigned to protect the Naboo Palace in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].
